macros.rationale: Protein: 2.2 g/kg lean mass (bulk/recomp, BF% known). Fat: ~25% of calories (diet-mode aware; no somatotype tweak). Carbs: remainder of calorie budget unless constrained by diet mode (omnivore).

recommendations: Plan is usable; continue improving fibre metadata and rotate recipe sources for adherence.

weekly_meal_plan.name: 7-day omnivore protocol meal plan

meals.name: Joe Ohrablo's Protein Oatmeal Pancakes Recipe
ingredients: 20 grams of carbs from fruit (banana, blueberries or strawberries)
meals.recipe:
Mix all ingredients into a pancake batter, adding a tiny bit of water to make it easy to mix
Spray nonstick pan with cooking spray
Cook until brown on each side
Throw on cinnamon for extra taste
Top with sugar free syrup if desired

meals.name: Vegan BBQ Tofu Stir Fry Recipe
ingredients: 1 tablespoon Tamari (gluten-free soy sauce), low sodium preferred
3 each Garlic, fresh, grated or 2 teaspoon garlic powder
1 teaspoon Ginger, fresh, grated, or 3 teaspoons ginger powder
meals.recipe:
Prepare the BBQ sauce by combining all ingredients in a bowl. Whisk to incorporate. Keep on the side.
Drain tofu and press by placing paper towels in the top and bottom of the tofu and placing a hefty book carefully on top of the tofu. Use a small sheet tray if needed to capture the water drainage. Press for at least 5 minutes, discard paper towels, and then dice block evenly. Transfer to a bowl. Season tofu with cornstarch, 2 tablespoons of the BBQ sauce, and a pinch of salt. Mix with hands to coat tofu evenly. Set aside.
Heat up avocado oil on a non-stick pan over medium-high heat. Once the oil is slightly smoking (about 30-45 seconds of constant heat), add the tofu. You want to hear a sear go on as we are looking at caramelizing the tofu and browning it on most sides. Do this for about 2-3 minutes, stirring as necessary. Add the vegetables, along with the quinoa and brown rice. Saute for another 2-3 minutes until heated through. Lastly, add the sauce into the pan and mix to coat all ingredients evenly. The s...
Conversely, if you are tracking your macros closely, heat up the quinoa separately in a bowl in the microwave, covered with a damp paper towel for 2 minutes. Do the same with the Trifecta vegetables. Still reheat the tofu in the pan by searing it over medium-high heat with avocado oil and the sauce.
Portion ⅔ cup of quinoa, ½ cup of Trifecta veggies, and 4 ounce of the saucy tofu on a bowl. Garnish with fresh herbs like cilantro, and some sesame seeds.
Enjoy!

meals.name: Doro Wat (Ethiopian Chicken Stew)
meals.recipe:
In a large pot over medium-low heat, add the niter kibbeh and allow it to melt.
Add the chopped onions, garlic, and ginger, and cook until caramelized.
Add the berbere spice, smoked paprika, black pepper, cumin, and salt. Stir for 2-3 minutes.
Pour in the chicken stock, add the tomato paste, and chicken thighs.
Cook for 30-40 minutes or till the chicken is tender.
Add in the boiled eggs and simmer for 10 mins on low heat.
Taste for spices & adjust.

meals.name: Tempeh Garlic Ginger Soy Bowl Recipe
ingredients: 16 ounces Tempeh, diced into bite sizes
1 cup Trifecta mixed veg or broccoli
1 avocado, sliced lengthwise, divided into quarters
meals.recipe:
For sauce: In a small saucepan, heat 2 teaspoons of avocado oil over medium heat. Add the minced garlic and ginger, and stir often for about 1 minute or until a dark golden color begins to form. Add red pepper flakes, Chinese five-spice, and stir for another 30 seconds, until spices are bright. Immediately add the tamari, stir and bring to an aggressive simmer for 3-5 minutes. As the sauce simmers, mix cornstarch and water in a small bowl to make a slurry. Add slurry into the sauce and simmer...
Heat remaining 1 teaspoon of avocado oil in a large non-stick saute pan over medium-high heat. Add 1 teaspoon of garlic, stir to avoid garlic from burning, and immediately add diced seitan. Mix often. The goal with this step is to sear and develop a golden brown color for the seitan. Once the seitan has caramelized, add the sauce to the pan and stir. Add the Trifecta bell peppers. Coat seitan and veggies evenly and cook for 2 minutes. Remove from heat and keep warm until needed.
Warm up the rice in the microwave for about 2-2:30 minutes, along with the Trifecta broccoli.
Portioning in 4 bowls, plate in each ½ cup of Trifecta rice, ¼ cup of broccoli, and 4.5 ounces of tempeh mix. Garnish with ¼ avocado per bowl, sesame seeds and fresh cilantro.

meals.name: Healthy Chili Recipe
ingredients: 2 lbs lean ground beef (80%) or turkey
meals.recipe:
Brown ground beef or turkey
Place meat in soup kettle with all ingredients
Season with salt and pepper
Optional additions: diced jalapenos, green chilies, ranch dressing seasoning packet, or salsa
If chili is too thick, add water as needed
Cook until thoroughly heated

meals.name: Salmon Eggs Benedict with Avocado Hollandaise
meals.recipe:
For the Hollandaise: In a blender combine ½ a ripe avocado and 2 pinches of salt and pepper with 2 tsps of lemon juice and 1/3 cup of water. Blend until smooth (approximately a minute and a half). While still blending, add 1 tablespoons of olive oil and continue to blend until combined. Set aside.
Then, In the small saucepan add a ½ tbsp of olive oil and a handful of spinach, salt, and pepper. Flip the spinach a couple of times so that is coated in the olive oil and cook down until the spinach is wilted. Remove from heat for later use.
In a small non-stick pan heat Trifecta salmon over low heat. When salmon is warm to the touch turn up heat to medium to lightly brown and crisp up the salmon filet.
While heating the salmon, toast the English muffin and eggs.
To plate, place a portion of the wilted spinach on the English muffin and layer the browned salmon and poached egg. Top with the avocado hollandaise and some red pepper flakes.

meals.name: Swedish Beef Patties With Onions Recipe
meals.recipe:
Mash the potatoes and mix with the ground beef
Add salt, pepper and water, work the meat mixture until smooth and shape into patties
Heat a skillet with 1 tbsp butter, add the onions and cook over moderate heat until golden brown
Transfer onions to a platter and keep hot
Melt remaining butter in skillet and cook the patties over moderate heat until brown on both sides and cooked throughout
Serve patties with sauteed onions and vegetables of your choice

meals.name: Beef Chop Suey Recipe
meals.recipe:
In a large nonstick frying pan add olive oil and beef, cook until brown. Do not overcook or beef goes tough
In a second pan, add olive oil, cabbage, celery, mushrooms, water chestnuts, soybean, vinegar and onion
Cook until entire mixture is hot and onions have softened
Add soy sauce, beef stock and cooked beef
Cook this mixture for 5-10 minutes

meals.name: Chicken and Mushroom Sauced-Noodle Recipe
ingredients: 8 oz cooked Lo mein, ramen, or lamian noodles
Cilantro or Thai basil for garnish, optional
meals.recipe:
Cook the noodles of your choice according to the packaging instructions. Drain, rinse under cold water and return to the same pan. Keep warm on the side off the heat. I highly encourage you to cook your noodles al dente -- this will help offset any potential reheating you may do.
If you so desire, add the hoisin and Sriracha to a small saucepan. Conversely, do not add these two optional ingredients, and simply add the Thai-peanut sauce of your choice to a pan and begin reducing it while all the other ingredients cook. I suggest you start this process as you are dropping your noodles to cook since you want a nicely reduced sauce to coat all your noodles evenly.
In a large saute pan, add the oil and bring the heat up to medium-high. Once the oil is shimmering, cook the garlic for a quick 1 minute. Immediately add the chicken, and cook for 2 minutes, stirring often. Add a pinch of lime juice to deglaze the pan if the bottom is getting too brown. Add the mushroom, saute and then add the spinach. Stir often to help cook the spinach and continue to reheat all other items. Lastly, I also suggest adding a splash of the sauce to the pan to coat all of the i...
Combine the now reduced sauce with the noodles and bring to a light simmer to reheat the noodles and sauce them. Add a pinch of water to the sauce if it has reduced too much. The sauce should beautifully coat the noodles - if the sauce is too watery, reduce the sauce a bit further with the noodles in it. Avoid reducing the sauce excessively or cooking the noodles in the sauce for too long as this will overcook them.
In a bowl, combine 3 ounces of the sauced noodles, along with 5 ounces of the chicken-vegetable mix. Mix to incorporate. Be careful not to burn yourself. Transfer to a plate and serve. Add any extra vegetables as desired for color and extra fiber (I added cherry tomatoes).

meals.name: Trifecta Five Minute Burger Recipe
ingredients: 4 hamburger buns, whole wheat or whole grain, toasted
2 tablespoons chipotle mayo or favorite condiment
½ cup arugula or any other bitter leafy green
½ cup Trifecta portobello mushroom, warmed
1 cup favorite Trifecta veggies, as a side
meals.recipe:
Begin by toasting buns in a toaster or toaster oven until golden brown.
Microwave Trifecta patties for 2 minutes to reheat, by making a small hole in a corner to allow steam to escape. Carefully remove plastic film and keep warm until needed. Spread the chipotle mayo on both burger buns. On the bottom bun, add a small ⅛ packed cup of arugula.
Slice tomatoes. Slice the avocados lengthwise and separate them into quarters. Fan avocado and place on top of the leafy greens. Carefully transfer the patties from the microwave to the bottom burger bun. Place 3 thin tomato slices or 2 thick slices on top of each patty. Top with ⅛ cup warm mushrooms and place the top bun on the burger.
Optional side: Reheat 1 cup of your favorite Trifecta vegetable and enjoy your 5-minute dinner!

meals.name: Coconut Cashew Keto Fried Chicken Recipe
meals.recipe:
Add the cashews into a food processor and pulse until coarse dust is formed. Add the coconut flakes, garlic, salt, paprika, and parsley. Pulse once again to combine. Transfer to a medium bowl.
In a separate bowl mix the egg, coconut milk, and water mixture. Mix together by whipping with a fork or with a hand blender until fully incorporated. Add a pinch of salt and black pepper.
Coat chicken by soaking first in the egg-coconut milk mixture. Dip chicken in the egg mixture followed then by cashew mixture, fully coating both sides of each piece and shaking off any excess. Transfer to a holding plate until all chicken pieces are fully coated.
Heat a skillet over medium-high heat, and add the coconut and avocado oil and allow to heat for 1-2 minutes. Carefully add the breaded chicken to the skillet using tongs by placing the chicken away from you to avoid hot oil from splashing and burning you. Cook until browned on each side and warmed through (about 3-4 minutes per side).

meals.name: Sriracha Honey Sesame Chicken Recipe
ingredients: ¾ cup water + 1 tablespoon garlic powder
¼ cup soy sauce, or tamari, low sodium
2 teaspoon cornstarch + 2 tablespoon water, mixed in a bowl
meals.recipe:
Place together all sauce ingredients in a medium pot and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to simmer and stir constantly for 2-5 minutes, allowing the sauce to slightly reduce. Add cornstarch 1 teaspoon at a time, allowing the cornstarch to react with the heat. Add a total of 3 teaspoons first and then adjust as desired. The sauce will thicken up over time. Cover and keep warm.
Dice chicken into bite-size. Add chicken to pot with sauce and mix to incorporate. Simmer for 2-3 minutes or until chicken is warmed and evenly covered. Cover pot and keep warm until needed.
Reheat the rice and broccoli for 3 minutes in two separate microwave-safe bowls. Add an extra 30 seconds to a minute if extra time is needed.
In a bowl, plate the following: ⅓ cup of reheated Trifecta brown rice, followed by 4 ounces of the sesame honey ginger chicken, and ½ cup of the reheated Trifecta broccoli.
Garnish with sesame seeds, picked fresh cilantro, extra Sriracha, and/or chives & scallions. Enjoy!

meals.name: Doro Wat (Ethiopian Spiced Chicken)
ingredients: 3 lbs chicken thighs (, cut into 1 inch pieces, or 3 chicken breasts, cut into 1/2 inch pieces)
1/2 cup Tej (Ethiopian honey wine) ((alternatively you can substitute white wine mixed with 1 teaspoon honey))
4 hard-boiled eggs (, pierced all over with fork about 1/4 inch deep)
meals.recipe:
Place the onions in a food processor and finely mince them to a chunky puree. Set aside.Place the chicken pieces in a bowl and pour lemon juice over. Let sit at room temperature for at least 30 minutes.
Heat the niter kibbeh or butter along with the olive oil in a Dutch oven or heavy pot. Add the onions and saute, covered, over low heat for 45 minutes, stirring occasionally.Add the garlic, ginger, and 1 tablespoon butter and continue to saute, covered, for another 20 minutes, stirring occasionally. Add the berbere and the 2 remaining tablespoons of butter and saute, covered, over low heat for another 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.Add the chicken, broth, salt and wine and bring to a boil....
Half or quarter the eggs and arrange on the plates with the stew. Serve hot with injera, bread or rice.

meals.name: Triple Chocolate Chip Deep Dish Protein Cookie Recipe
ingredients: Optional toppings: ice cream, additional chocolate peanut butter for drizzling
meals.recipe:
Preheat oven to 350 degrees F
Combine all ingredients except chocolate chips in a bowl
Using an electric mixer, mix well
Gently fold in chocolate chips
Pour batter into an 8 inch oven safe skillet (cast iron skillet works best)
Bake for approximately 20 minutes or until top is golden
Allow to sit 5-10 minutes to finish cooking
Top with ice cream and additional chocolate peanut butter if desired

meals.name: Smokey Grilled Cheddar And Chipotle Burger Recipe
meals.recipe: Mix beef with salt, pepper, chipotle powder and coffee. Form into 8 patties. Grill until cooked, top with cheese. Serve in bun with onion and BBQ sauce.

meals.name: Paleo Spiced Roasted Butternut Squash Recipe
ingredients: 1 whole butternut squash, stems removed, peeled, and seeded
meals.recipe:
Preheat oven to 450F. Cut both ends, peel the butternut squash, and seed it. Discard skin and seeds. Cut the squash into small evenly-sized rectangles and transfer to a sheet tray lined with foil.
Mix the spice mix, including the salt, in a small bowl. Season the butternut squash liberally with the spice mix and add the oil. Mix with hands to fully incorporate.
Roast in the preheated oven for 35 minutes. Pierce with a fork to test doneness. There should be no resistance. If there is, add 10 minutes and continue roasting.
Remove from oven, cool down and store in an airtight container, or serve 3 oz per dish for exact macros. Conversely, if you are serving this for dinner, serve immediately with your preferred protein and paleo vegetables.

meals.name: Peanut Butter Chocolate Chip Protein French Toast Recipe
meals.recipe:
Preheat pan or griddle to medium/high heat
Whisk together egg, protein powder, cinnamon, and milk
Soak each slice of bread in egg mixture on each side
Cook french toast on each side about 3 minutes or until golden brown
Heat peanut butter until melty
Drizzle over french toast and sprinkle with mini chocolate chips

meals.name: Nichole Ohrablo's Super Shake Recipe
meals.recipe:
Add all ingredients to blender
Blend until smooth
Serve and enjoy

meals.name: Doro Wat Ethiopian Chicken Stew
ingredients: 3-3½ pounds (1.3-1.6kg) chicken, (cut in pieces (or chicken thighs))
3 tablespoons (42g) spiced butter, (or more (sub with cooking oil))
4-6 large eggs, (soft boiled and shells removed)
meals.recipe:
Season chicken with, salt, and pepper. Set aside.
Heat a large pot over medium heat, and when it's hot, add spiced butter and onions. Sauté onions, stirring frequently, until they are deep brown - 7-10 minutes.
After the onions are caramelized or reach a deep brown color, add some more oil, followed by the Berbere spice, garlic, and ginger.
Stir for about 2-3 minutes for the flavors to blossom and the mixture has a deep rich brown color. Be careful not to let it burn.
Then add about 2-3 cups water. Add chicken, tomato paste, paprika, basil, salt, and cook for about 30 minutes.
Throw in the eggs and lemon juice; thoroughly mix to ensure that the eggs are immersed in the sauce.
Continue cooking until chicken is tender about 10 minutes or more.
Adjust sauce thickness and seasoning with water or broth, lemon, salt according to preference.
Serve warm.

meals.name: Cinnamon Chip Caramel Protein Bars Recipe
ingredients: 4 scoops vanilla caramel whey protein powder
meals.recipe:
Preheat oven to 350 degrees
Line a 9x13 inch pan with parchment paper
Combine all dry ingredients in a bowl (protein, oats, cinnamon and salt)
Mix together all wet ingredients (milk, almond butter, honey and extract)
Combine wet and dry ingredients
Stir in cinnamon chips
Pour into baking dish
Bake for approximately 15 minutes
Remove from oven and allow to cool (bars will finish setting)
Slice into desired size bars
Store in a sealed container

meals.name: Mediterranean Rice Recipe
meals.recipe:
Boil basmati rice for approximately 15-20 minutes
Add rice to bowl
Cut up red onion into strips and add to rice
Drain tuna and add to rice
Cut avocado into small squares and add to rice
Squeeze lemon juice over rice
Add salt and pepper if desired

meals.name: Almond and Banana Breakfast Drink Recipe
meals.recipe:
Place all ingredients into a blender
Blend until smooth
Add extra water if you prefer a weaker mixture
Pour into a tall glass and drink

meals.name: Vegan Meatballs & Spaghetti Squash Pasta Recipe
ingredients: 1 (25 oz) Jar Tomato Basil Pasta Sauce, store-bought or homemade
Pinch of Black Pepper and Sea Salt
meals.recipe:
Preheat an oven to 425 degrees Fahrenheit. Place spaghetti squash cut-side down on a foil-lined sheet tray and roast for 25 minutes.
Remove from the oven and let sit on the baking tray for 5 minutes. Using a fork, scrape out the inside spaghetti and set aside.
Place the beyond beef into a medium bowl, then combine all other meatball ingredients into a food processor, pulse till coarsely chopped. Mix with the beyond beef and form 1-inch meatballs.
Pre-heat a medium-sized non-stick skillet over medium heat, add oil.
Sear meatballs in the pan for 5 minutes, turning occasionally. Add Pasta Sauce and simmer for 20 minutes.
To plate: combine with spaghetti squash and top with vegan parmesan, red pepper flakes, and fresh herbs.

meals.name: Bodybuilders' Steak & Grilled Cheese Sandwich Recipe
ingredients: 2 slices reduced fat pepper jack cheese
8 oz thinly sliced sirloin tip steak
meals.recipe:
Season meat and cook as desired
Add peppers and onions to medium skillet and cook until tender
Layer steak, veggies and cheese onto bread
Top with additional bread slice
Heat medium skillet or grill pan over medium heat
Add sandwich to pan and toast until golden
Flip and toast until cheese is fully melted

meals.name: Salmon Stir-Fried Noodles Recipe
meals.recipe:
Place egg noodles (dry/dehydrated) into a pan of boiling water along with a pinch of salt, and cover for 3-4 minutes.
Remove the noodles from the heat and drain. Keep the noodles in the sieve on top of the pan, and place the lid back over so that the steam keeps the noodles from drying out.
Quarter bok choy lengthwise (cutting it in half, and then repeating the process with each half).
Slice carrot into long, thin strips, about a quarter-inch thick. And chop broccoli into 1-inch long pieces.
Warm pan over medium heat. Coat with spray oil and add vegetables. Cook for 5-7 minutes, stirring occasionally.
For the sauce, add low sodium soy sauce, hot sauce, and corn starch to 2/3 cups of water and mix well.
Using a garlic press, crush the garlic cloves into the mixture and stir.
Add sauce to the stir-fry vegetables in the pan and reduce heat to a simmer for several minutes, stirring and letting the sauce reduce a bit.
Turn off the heat and mix in the noodles, coated everything evenly with the sauce.
Transfer all contents of the pan to a plate and then break apart chunks of the Trifecta Salmon and arrange on top. Then Enjoy!

meals.name: Tuna, Avocado and Tomato Recipe
ingredients: 150g pre-cooked cannellini or lima beans, rinsed and drained
meals.recipe:
Brush tuna steak with olive oil and grill or dry-fry about 3 mins on each side until outside is golden but inside still pink
Steam or microwave asparagus tips until just tender
Halve tomatoes, squeeze out pips then chop roughly
Arrange beans on serving plates with tomato, asparagus, and onion
Peel and slice avocado, add to plates
Mix together oil, lemon juice, most of oregano and seasoning
Pour most of dressing over salad, slice tuna and add
Drizzle remaining dressing and garnish with rest of oregano

meals.name: Kurt Weidner's Sweet Potato Waffles Recipe
meals.recipe:
Add all ingredients into a blender
Blend until smooth
Pour mixture into a waffle maker, heat and serve

meals.name: Honey BBQ Slow Cooker Chicken Wings Recipe
meals.recipe:
Preheat oven to 450 degrees
Line a baking sheet with parchment paper, place chicken wings on sheet and cook 10 minutes
While baking, spray slow cooker with nonstick spray, add half the BBQ sauce to the bottom
When wings are done, add to slow cooker, top with remaining BBQ sauce
Cook on high heat 2-3 hours or low heat 4-5 hours
Mix together cornstarch and water, 15 minutes before wings are done add cornstarch mixture and toss to coat
Allow the wings to finish cooking and the sauce to thicken
Serve piping hot

meals.name: Chicken Burrito Bowl Recipe
ingredients: Fresh cilantro stems and or cheese of choice
meals.recipe:
Dice the chicken into even small squares, bite-size. Keep in a bowl. Chop the lettuce and keep separated. Make sure you clean your cutting board between tasks to avoid cross-contamination of flavors.
Mix the marinade ingredients in a bowl and whisk to incorporate. A paste should form. Toss the diced chicken into the bowl and coat uniformly.
Spray a non-stick pan with spray oil and heat over medium heat. Once the pan is beginning to slightly smoke, add the chicken and heat up 2-3 minutes, stirring constantly. Keep warm.
Meanwhile, reheat your rice in two separate bowls for 2.5 minutes in the microwave.
In a plate or bowl, plate ⅓ cup of white rice next to ⅓ cup of brown rice. Weight 4.5 ounces of chicken per bowl, ¼ cup of pico de gallo, ¼ cup of romaine, ¼ fanned avocado, and 2 teaspoons of greek yogurt on top. Pick washed fresh cilantro and garnish.

meals.name: Chocolate And Peanut Butter Protein Bars Recipe
meals.recipe:
Preheat oven to 350 degrees F
Place oats in blender and pulse until flour-like texture
Mix oat flour, cinnamon and chocolate whey protein in a bowl
Add peanut butter and mix thoroughly
Mash bananas and add with honey and egg whites, mix well
Add skim milk and mix again
Pour batter into greased 9x9 or 9x13 baking pan
Bake 15-20 minutes until toothpick comes out clean
Allow to cool and cut into 6 bars

meals.name: Sega Wat (Spicy Ethiopian Beef Stew)
ingredients: 2 pounds boneless beef chuck, cut into 1/2 inch cubes
3 cups chunky pureed onions (pulse in food processor to form a chunky paste)
4 hard-boiled eggs, shelled and pierced all over with a fork 1/4 inch deep
meals.recipe:
Heat 3 tablespoons of niter kibbeh or butter in a heavy pot or Dutch oven. Add the onions and cook, covered, over low heat for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally. Add the garlic, ginger, and 1 tablespoon niter kibbeh and continue to cook for another 10 minutes, stirring occasionally. Add the berbere and the 2 remaining tablespoons of niter kibbeh and cook, covered, over low heat for another 10 minutes, stirring occasionally. Add the beef, broth, salt and bring to a boil. Reduce the heat to low...
Adjust the seasonings, adding more berbere according to taste and heat preference. Add the hard-boiled eggs and simmer on low heat, covered, for another 10 to heat through. Half or quarter the eggs and arrange on the plates with the stew. Serve hot with Ethiopian injera, bread or rice.*This stew is even better the next day after the flavors have had more time to meld.

meals.name: Low Carb, High Protein Breakfast Pizza Eggs Recipe
ingredients: Pizza seasoning or Italian Herbs to taste
meals.recipe:
Coat a 9 inch skillet with nonstick spray
Whisk together egg, egg whites, zucchini, coconut flour and pizza seasoning
Pour mixture into pan and set over medium heat
Cover pan and cook until eggs are set and edges become slightly golden
Top with pasta sauce and grated cheese

meals.name: Easy Steak Birria Tacos Recipe
ingredients: 16 ounces Trifecta flat iron steak, small diced into even squares
2 Guajillo chiles, dried, stem and seeds removed (¼ cup water saved)
meals.recipe:
Remove Trifecta flat iron steak and dice into small squares (think LA street tacos small dice cut).
Cut the onion in half and roughly chop one half. Add to a blender and keep aside for now. Then finely dice the other half and set aside in a small bowl. Rough chop the cilantro and add into the finely diced onion (this will be the garnish). Set aside.
Remove the stem of the chiles by cutting the top part. Once the top stem is cut, scoop out all seeds using the neck of a small spoon. It’s okay if chiles break. Remove as many seeds as possible. Add Anaheim chiles into a small saucepan and cover with water and bring to a boil. Reduce to a light simmer and simmer for 15 minutes. Remove from heat and leave covered for 5 minutes (this will steam the chiles further). Reserve ¼ cup of the boiling water and discard the rest.
Transfer the now boiled and rehydrated Anaheim chile to a blender with half of the roughly chopped onion. Add the 2 teaspoons of the pureed chipotle in adobo, ¼ cup of the boiling water, ¾ cup of beef stock, the garlic, avocado oil, and honey. Blend by starting to blend slowly, until chiles are pureed and the mix is smooth. Taste for seasoning and adjust if needed. Transfer to a medium bowl. You will have more puree than you need for this recipe.
Combine in a medium saute pan the diced flat iron steak, along with ¾ cup of the chile puree. Bring to a boil mixing constantly to heat through and then reduce the heat to a simmer and slightly reduce the sauce.
Meanwhile heat tortillas and keep warm. Heat over an open flame or in a microwave covered with a damp cloth towel. Keep warm until needed.
Cut lime wedges into quarters.
Place two tortillas per plate, and add 2 ounces of the warmed flat iron steak on each tortilla. Top with onion-cilantro mix. Serve with a lime wedge. Enjoy!

meals.name: Homemade High Protein White Cheddar Mac & Cheese Recipe
meals.recipe:
Preheat oven to 420 degrees
Cook pasta 2 minutes shy of directions
Drain pasta and return to pot
Add milk, seasonings, cottage cheese and Greek yogurt to pasta
Slowly mix in white cheddar cheese and half of parmesan
Pour pasta into an oven safe baking dish
Sprinkle with 2 tbsp of oat bran and remaining parmesan cheese
Bake until golden and bubbly

meals.name: Simple & Tasty Pesto Egg Sandwich
ingredients: Slice up some of your fav fruit (optional)
meals.recipe:
Cut bread into thick slices.
Cut into thin slices: prosciutto, radish, and egg.
Spread pesto over bread.
Add prosciutto, radish, then peeled hard-boiled egg slices.
Enjoy with your favorite fruit or salad on the side.

meals.name: New-England Style Shrimp Rolls
ingredients: 1 Tsp of Paprika (can use more to top)
meals.recipe:
First, heat the Trifecta shrimp up in the microwave for 2-3 minutes or until warm.
Then spray the potato bun with the butter and toast.
On a cutting board, dice up the celery and cut the green onions.
In a bowl, cut up the shrimp as best as you can into smaller pieces. Then add all the ingredients (except the green onions) and mix together. Include a dash of salt and pepper.
Fill the potato bun with the shrimp mixture. Lightly top with paprika and green onions. Enjoy!

target_macros.rationale: Protein: 2.2 g/kg lean mass (bulk/recomp, BF% known). Fat: ~25% of calories (diet-mode aware; no somatotype tweak). Carbs: remainder of calorie budget unless constrained by diet mode (omnivore).

water_guidance: Aim to be peeing clear by noon.
Have five clear urinations a day.
Don't be dehydrated at the time of your workouts.
Taper water toward the end of the day so you don't wake to pee.

protocol_notes: Calories are matched by portion scaling at the day level.
Protein is scored during meal selection, but add a lean protein side if a day falls short.
Diet/allergen filters are hard constraints; cuisine preference is a soft adherence preference.
Use weekly average adherence, weight, and measurements before changing calories.
Fruit/veg target: 4 cups fruit and 4 cups vegetables daily; fibre target ~49 g/day.

alternatives.selected: Joe Ohrablo's Protein Oatmeal Pancakes Recipe

In a small non-stick pan heat Trifecta salmon over low heat. When salmon is warm to the touch turn up heat to medium to lightly brown and crisp up the salmon filet.
While heating the salmon, toast the English muffin and eggs.
To plate, place a portion of the wilted spinach on the English muffin and layer the browned salmon and poached egg. Top with the avocado hollandaise and some red pepper flakes.

In a separate bowl mix the egg, coconut milk, and water mixture. Mix together by whipping with a fork or with a hand blender until fully incorporated. Add a pinch of salt and black pepper.
Coat chicken by soaking first in the egg-coconut milk mixture. Dip chicken in the egg mixture followed then by cashew mixture, fully coating both sides of each piece and shaking off any excess. Transfer to a holding plate until all chicken pieces are fully coated.
Heat a skillet over medium-high heat, and add the coconut and avocado oil and allow to heat for 1-2 minutes. Carefully add the breaded chicken to the skillet using tongs by placing the chicken away from you to avoid hot oil from splashing and burning you. Cook until browned on each side and warmed through (about 3-4 minutes per side).

Heat peanut butter until melty
Drizzle over french toast and sprinkle with mini chocolate chips

alternatives.selected: Vegan BBQ Tofu Stir Fry Recipe

alternatives.name: Swedish Beef Patties With Onions Recipe
alternatives.recipe:
Mash the potatoes and mix with the ground beef
Add salt, pepper and water, work the meat mixture until smooth and shape into patties
Heat a skillet with 1 tbsp butter, add the onions and cook over moderate heat until golden brown
Transfer onions to a platter and keep hot
Melt remaining butter in skillet and cook the patties over moderate heat until brown on both sides and cooked throughout
Serve patties with sauteed onions and vegetables of your choice

alternatives.name: Chicken and Mushroom Sauced-Noodle Recipe
ingredients: 8 oz cooked Lo mein, ramen, or lamian noodles
Cilantro or Thai basil for garnish, optional
alternatives.recipe:
Cook the noodles of your choice according to the packaging instructions. Drain, rinse under cold water and return to the same pan. Keep warm on the side off the heat. I highly encourage you to cook your noodles al dente -- this will help offset any potential reheating you may do.
If you so desire, add the hoisin and Sriracha to a small saucepan. Conversely, do not add these two optional ingredients, and simply add the Thai-peanut sauce of your choice to a pan and begin reducing it while all the other ingredients cook. I suggest you start this process as you are dropping your noodles to cook since you want a nicely reduced sauce to coat all your noodles evenly.
In a large saute pan, add the oil and bring the heat up to medium-high. Once the oil is shimmering, cook the garlic for a quick 1 minute. Immediately add the chicken, and cook for 2 minutes, stirring often. Add a pinch of lime juice to deglaze the pan if the bottom is getting too brown. Add the mushroom, saute and then add the spinach. Stir often to help cook the spinach and continue to reheat all other items. Lastly, I also suggest adding a splash of the sauce to the pan to coat all of the i...
Combine the now reduced sauce with the noodles and bring to a light simmer to reheat the noodles and sauce them. Add a pinch of water to the sauce if it has reduced too much. The sauce should beautifully coat the noodles - if the sauce is too watery, reduce the sauce a bit further with the noodles in it. Avoid reducing the sauce excessively or cooking the noodles in the sauce for too long as this will overcook them.
In a bowl, combine 3 ounces of the sauced noodles, along with 5 ounces of the chicken-vegetable mix. Mix to incorporate. Be careful not to burn yourself. Transfer to a plate and serve. Add any extra vegetables as desired for color and extra fiber (I added cherry tomatoes).

alternatives.name: Sriracha Honey Sesame Chicken Recipe
ingredients: ¾ cup water + 1 tablespoon garlic powder
¼ cup soy sauce, or tamari, low sodium
2 teaspoon cornstarch + 2 tablespoon water, mixed in a bowl
alternatives.recipe:
Place together all sauce ingredients in a medium pot and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to simmer and stir constantly for 2-5 minutes, allowing the sauce to slightly reduce. Add cornstarch 1 teaspoon at a time, allowing the cornstarch to react with the heat. Add a total of 3 teaspoons first and then adjust as desired. The sauce will thicken up over time. Cover and keep warm.
Dice chicken into bite-size. Add chicken to pot with sauce and mix to incorporate. Simmer for 2-3 minutes or until chicken is warmed and evenly covered. Cover pot and keep warm until needed.
Reheat the rice and broccoli for 3 minutes in two separate microwave-safe bowls. Add an extra 30 seconds to a minute if extra time is needed.
In a bowl, plate the following: ⅓ cup of reheated Trifecta brown rice, followed by 4 ounces of the sesame honey ginger chicken, and ½ cup of the reheated Trifecta broccoli.
Garnish with sesame seeds, picked fresh cilantro, extra Sriracha, and/or chives & scallions. Enjoy!

alternatives.selected: Doro Wat (Ethiopian Chicken Stew)

alternatives.name: Chicken Burrito Bowl Recipe
ingredients: Fresh cilantro stems and or cheese of choice
alternatives.recipe:

Mix the marinade ingredients in a bowl and whisk to incorporate. A paste should form. Toss the diced chicken into the bowl and coat uniformly.
Spray a non-stick pan with spray oil and heat over medium heat. Once the pan is beginning to slightly smoke, add the chicken and heat up 2-3 minutes, stirring constantly. Keep warm.
Meanwhile, reheat your rice in two separate bowls for 2.5 minutes in the microwave.
In a plate or bowl, plate ⅓ cup of white rice next to ⅓ cup of brown rice. Weight 4.5 ounces of chicken per bowl, ¼ cup of pico de gallo, ¼ cup of romaine, ¼ fanned avocado, and 2 teaspoons of greek yogurt on top. Pick washed fresh cilantro and garnish.

ingredients: 4oz Trifecta Chicken Breast, diced into squares

alternatives.recipe:

Heat up the pre-cooked butternut squash in the microwave. Cook for 3-5 minutes or until the squash softens.
Meanwhile, in a non-stick skillet, heat up the oil over medium heat, add the garlic, Trifecta chicken, and butternut squash. Cut up the chicken in the skillet and heat until golden.
Add the eggs to the skillet and scramble. As the noodles become 75%-80% cooked through, add the noodles to the skillet. Add the fish sauce, teriyaki sauce, and sriracha. Stir often.
Add the bean sprouts. Cook for an additional minute to two until bean sprouts are heated through. Serve on a bowl.
Top with red pepper flakes and cilantro.

Cook until entire mixture is hot and onions have softened
Add soy sauce, beef stock and cooked beef
Cook this mixture for 5-10 minutes

alternatives.name: Trifecta Five Minute Burger Recipe
ingredients: 4 hamburger buns, whole wheat or whole grain, toasted
2 tablespoons chipotle mayo or favorite condiment
½ cup arugula or any other bitter leafy green
½ cup Trifecta portobello mushroom, warmed
1 cup favorite Trifecta veggies, as a side
alternatives.recipe:
Begin by toasting buns in a toaster or toaster oven until golden brown.
Microwave Trifecta patties for 2 minutes to reheat, by making a small hole in a corner to allow steam to escape. Carefully remove plastic film and keep warm until needed. Spread the chipotle mayo on both burger buns. On the bottom bun, add a small ⅛ packed cup of arugula.
Slice tomatoes. Slice the avocados lengthwise and separate them into quarters. Fan avocado and place on top of the leafy greens. Carefully transfer the patties from the microwave to the bottom burger bun. Place 3 thin tomato slices or 2 thick slices on top of each patty. Top with ⅛ cup warm mushrooms and place the top bun on the burger.
Optional side: Reheat 1 cup of your favorite Trifecta vegetable and enjoy your 5-minute dinner!

alternatives.name: Sega Wat (Spicy Ethiopian Beef Stew)
ingredients: 2 pounds boneless beef chuck, cut into 1/2 inch cubes
3 cups chunky pureed onions (pulse in food processor to form a chunky paste)
4 hard-boiled eggs, shelled and pierced all over with a fork 1/4 inch deep
alternatives.recipe:
Heat 3 tablespoons of niter kibbeh or butter in a heavy pot or Dutch oven. Add the onions and cook, covered, over low heat for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally. Add the garlic, ginger, and 1 tablespoon niter kibbeh and continue to cook for another 10 minutes, stirring occasionally. Add the berbere and the 2 remaining tablespoons of niter kibbeh and cook, covered, over low heat for another 10 minutes, stirring occasionally. Add the beef, broth, salt and bring to a boil. Reduce the heat to low...
Adjust the seasonings, adding more berbere according to taste and heat preference. Add the hard-boiled eggs and simmer on low heat, covered, for another 10 to heat through. Half or quarter the eggs and arrange on the plates with the stew. Serve hot with Ethiopian injera, bread or rice.*This stew is even better the next day after the flavors have had more time to meld.

alternatives.name: Salmon Stir-Fried Noodles Recipe
alternatives.recipe:
Place egg noodles (dry/dehydrated) into a pan of boiling water along with a pinch of salt, and cover for 3-4 minutes.
Remove the noodles from the heat and drain. Keep the noodles in the sieve on top of the pan, and place the lid back over so that the steam keeps the noodles from drying out.
Quarter bok choy lengthwise (cutting it in half, and then repeating the process with each half).
Slice carrot into long, thin strips, about a quarter-inch thick. And chop broccoli into 1-inch long pieces.
Warm pan over medium heat. Coat with spray oil and add vegetables. Cook for 5-7 minutes, stirring occasionally.
For the sauce, add low sodium soy sauce, hot sauce, and corn starch to 2/3 cups of water and mix well.
Using a garlic press, crush the garlic cloves into the mixture and stir.
Add sauce to the stir-fry vegetables in the pan and reduce heat to a simmer for several minutes, stirring and letting the sauce reduce a bit.
Turn off the heat and mix in the noodles, coated everything evenly with the sauce.
Transfer all contents of the pan to a plate and then break apart chunks of the Trifecta Salmon and arrange on top. Then Enjoy!

alternatives.name: Vegan BBQ Tofu Stir Fry Recipe
ingredients: 1 tablespoon Tamari (gluten-free soy sauce), low sodium preferred
3 each Garlic, fresh, grated or 2 teaspoon garlic powder
1 teaspoon Ginger, fresh, grated, or 3 teaspoons ginger powder
alternatives.recipe:
Prepare the BBQ sauce by combining all ingredients in a bowl. Whisk to incorporate. Keep on the side.
Drain tofu and press by placing paper towels in the top and bottom of the tofu and placing a hefty book carefully on top of the tofu. Use a small sheet tray if needed to capture the water drainage. Press for at least 5 minutes, discard paper towels, and then dice block evenly. Transfer to a bowl. Season tofu with cornstarch, 2 tablespoons of the BBQ sauce, and a pinch of salt. Mix with hands to coat tofu evenly. Set aside.
Heat up avocado oil on a non-stick pan over medium-high heat. Once the oil is slightly smoking (about 30-45 seconds of constant heat), add the tofu. You want to hear a sear go on as we are looking at caramelizing the tofu and browning it on most sides. Do this for about 2-3 minutes, stirring as necessary. Add the vegetables, along with the quinoa and brown rice. Saute for another 2-3 minutes until heated through. Lastly, add the sauce into the pan and mix to coat all ingredients evenly. The s...
Conversely, if you are tracking your macros closely, heat up the quinoa separately in a bowl in the microwave, covered with a damp paper towel for 2 minutes. Do the same with the Trifecta vegetables. Still reheat the tofu in the pan by searing it over medium-high heat with avocado oil and the sauce.
Portion ⅔ cup of quinoa, ½ cup of Trifecta veggies, and 4 ounce of the saucy tofu on a bowl. Garnish with fresh herbs like cilantro, and some sesame seeds.
Enjoy!

alternatives.name: Tempeh Garlic Ginger Soy Bowl Recipe
ingredients: 16 ounces Tempeh, diced into bite sizes
1 cup Trifecta mixed veg or broccoli
1 avocado, sliced lengthwise, divided into quarters
alternatives.recipe:
For sauce: In a small saucepan, heat 2 teaspoons of avocado oil over medium heat. Add the minced garlic and ginger, and stir often for about 1 minute or until a dark golden color begins to form. Add red pepper flakes, Chinese five-spice, and stir for another 30 seconds, until spices are bright. Immediately add the tamari, stir and bring to an aggressive simmer for 3-5 minutes. As the sauce simmers, mix cornstarch and water in a small bowl to make a slurry. Add slurry into the sauce and simmer...
Heat remaining 1 teaspoon of avocado oil in a large non-stick saute pan over medium-high heat. Add 1 teaspoon of garlic, stir to avoid garlic from burning, and immediately add diced seitan. Mix often. The goal with this step is to sear and develop a golden brown color for the seitan. Once the seitan has caramelized, add the sauce to the pan and stir. Add the Trifecta bell peppers. Coat seitan and veggies evenly and cook for 2 minutes. Remove from heat and keep warm until needed.
Warm up the rice in the microwave for about 2-2:30 minutes, along with the Trifecta broccoli.
Portioning in 4 bowls, plate in each ½ cup of Trifecta rice, ¼ cup of broccoli, and 4.5 ounces of tempeh mix. Garnish with ¼ avocado per bowl, sesame seeds and fresh cilantro.

alternatives.name: Easy Paleo Chili Beef Recipe
ingredients: 2 cups diced tomato, canned, juice drained and ¼ cup reserved.
alternatives.recipe:
Microwave the Trifecta beef patties covered completely by a damp paper cloth towel, for a minute and a half. Remove from microwave and after the patties are slightly cooled down, crumble the patties to its original form - ground beef - with your hands into a separate bowl. Keep warm.
Combine all the seasoning spice mix ingredients in a separate bowl, with the exception of salt.
Dice the onion and keep in a bowl. Heat oil over medium-high in a pot large enough to hold all ingredients. Once the oil is shimmering and slightly smoking, add the onions, mix constantly to prevent onions from burning. Reduce heat to medium and cook onions for 3-5 minutes or until they start to develop a caramelized color. Use your best judgment on the timing. Once some caramelization begins to happen, add bell peppers and garlic and mix to cook for 2 minutes, avoiding the garlic from burnin...
Add the spice mix to the pot and mix to fully coat all the vegetables. The point of this step is to bring the fragrant tones of the spices up. After a few seconds, add canned tomatoes by crushing them with your hand as you add them to the pot, or by crushing them with a wooden or metal spoon in the pot. Mix and scrape any brown bits from the pan. Add ¼ cup of tomato juice, plus water or stock and increase the heat to bring to a boil. Once boiling, reduce heat to medium-high and maintain an ag...
Immediately add the ground beef along with honey, and mix to incorporate. Bring the pot back up to an aggressive simmer, mixing constantly, for about 3 minutes or until beef is heated through. Add extra water or stock if the sauce is becoming too thick.
Taste for seasoning and adjust as needed. Use your best judgment in the heat adjustment.
Portion around 5-6 ounces of chili into 4 bowls. There may be excess chili as the volume increases with the addition of all other ingredients (so you may have to weigh a bit more than 6 ounces).
Garnish each bowl with your preferred condiments or garnishes (chives, cheese, tortilla strips, and even fried shallots are some of my favorites).

In a small non-stick pan heat Trifecta salmon over low heat. When salmon is warm to the touch turn up heat to medium to lightly brown and crisp up the salmon filet.

Preheat oven to 450 degrees
Line a baking sheet with parchment paper, place chicken wings on sheet and cook 10 minutes
While baking, spray slow cooker with nonstick spray, add half the BBQ sauce to the bottom
When wings are done, add to slow cooker, top with remaining BBQ sauce
Cook on high heat 2-3 hours or low heat 4-5 hours
Mix together cornstarch and water, 15 minutes before wings are done add cornstarch mixture and toss to coat
Allow the wings to finish cooking and the sauce to thicken

Bake 15-20 minutes until toothpick comes out clean
Allow to cool and cut into 6 bars

ingredients: 0.25 cup assorted colored bell peppers, sliced

Microwave Trifecta patties for 2 minutes to reheat, by making a small hole in a corner to allow steam to escape. Carefully remove plastic film and keep warm until needed. Spread the chipotle mayo on both burger buns. On the bottom bun, add a small ⅛ packed cup of arugula.
Slice tomatoes. Slice the avocados lengthwise and separate them into quarters. Fan avocado and place on top of the leafy greens. Carefully transfer the patties from the microwave to the bottom burger bun. Place 3 thin tomato slices or 2 thick slices on top of each patty. Top with ⅛ cup warm mushrooms and place the top bun on the burger.

ingredients: 2 pounds boneless beef chuck, cut into 1/2 inch cubes
3 cups chunky pureed onions (pulse in food processor to form a chunky paste)
4 hard-boiled eggs, shelled and pierced all over with a fork 1/4 inch deep
alternatives.recipe:
Heat 3 tablespoons of niter kibbeh or butter in a heavy pot or Dutch oven. Add the onions and cook, covered, over low heat for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally. Add the garlic, ginger, and 1 tablespoon niter kibbeh and continue to cook for another 10 minutes, stirring occasionally. Add the berbere and the 2 remaining tablespoons of niter kibbeh and cook, covered, over low heat for another 10 minutes, stirring occasionally. Add the beef, broth, salt and bring to a boil. Reduce the heat to low...
Adjust the seasonings, adding more berbere according to taste and heat preference. Add the hard-boiled eggs and simmer on low heat, covered, for another 10 to heat through. Half or quarter the eggs and arrange on the plates with the stew. Serve hot with Ethiopian injera, bread or rice.*This stew is even better the next day after the flavors have had more time to meld.

Dice chicken into even bite-sized squares. Transfer chicken into the pot with sauce and bring up to heat until chicken is fully heated through. Reduce heat to low and keep covered until needed. Stir every now and then if for some reason you keep the pot on the fire for longer than 5 minutes.
Meanwhile, heat up Trifecta mashed potato and cauliflower in two separate microwave-safe bowls for 3 minutes. Add 30 seconds if the food is not heated all the way through.

ingredients: ¾ cup water + 1 tablespoon garlic powder

alternatives.recipe:
Place together all sauce ingredients in a medium pot and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to simmer and stir constantly for 2-5 minutes, allowing the sauce to slightly reduce. Add cornstarch 1 teaspoon at a time, allowing the cornstarch to react with the heat. Add a total of 3 teaspoons first and then adjust as desired. The sauce will thicken up over time. Cover and keep warm.
Dice chicken into bite-size. Add chicken to pot with sauce and mix to incorporate. Simmer for 2-3 minutes or until chicken is warmed and evenly covered. Cover pot and keep warm until needed.
Reheat the rice and broccoli for 3 minutes in two separate microwave-safe bowls. Add an extra 30 seconds to a minute if extra time is needed.
In a bowl, plate the following: ⅓ cup of reheated Trifecta brown rice, followed by 4 ounces of the sesame honey ginger chicken, and ½ cup of the reheated Trifecta broccoli.
Garnish with sesame seeds, picked fresh cilantro, extra Sriracha, and/or chives & scallions. Enjoy!

When wings are done, add to slow cooker, top with remaining BBQ sauce
Cook on high heat 2-3 hours or low heat 4-5 hours
Mix together cornstarch and water, 15 minutes before wings are done add cornstarch mixture and toss to coat
Allow the wings to finish cooking and the sauce to thicken
Serve piping hot

Bake 15-20 minutes until toothpick comes out clean

alternatives.name: Chicken and Mushroom Sauced-Noodle Recipe
ingredients: 8 oz cooked Lo mein, ramen, or lamian noodles
Cilantro or Thai basil for garnish, optional
alternatives.recipe:
Cook the noodles of your choice according to the packaging instructions. Drain, rinse under cold water and return to the same pan. Keep warm on the side off the heat. I highly encourage you to cook your noodles al dente -- this will help offset any potential reheating you may do.
If you so desire, add the hoisin and Sriracha to a small saucepan. Conversely, do not add these two optional ingredients, and simply add the Thai-peanut sauce of your choice to a pan and begin reducing it while all the other ingredients cook. I suggest you start this process as you are dropping your noodles to cook since you want a nicely reduced sauce to coat all your noodles evenly.
In a large saute pan, add the oil and bring the heat up to medium-high. Once the oil is shimmering, cook the garlic for a quick 1 minute. Immediately add the chicken, and cook for 2 minutes, stirring often. Add a pinch of lime juice to deglaze the pan if the bottom is getting too brown. Add the mushroom, saute and then add the spinach. Stir often to help cook the spinach and continue to reheat all other items. Lastly, I also suggest adding a splash of the sauce to the pan to coat all of the i...
Combine the now reduced sauce with the noodles and bring to a light simmer to reheat the noodles and sauce them. Add a pinch of water to the sauce if it has reduced too much. The sauce should beautifully coat the noodles - if the sauce is too watery, reduce the sauce a bit further with the noodles in it. Avoid reducing the sauce excessively or cooking the noodles in the sauce for too long as this will overcook them.
In a bowl, combine 3 ounces of the sauced noodles, along with 5 ounces of the chicken-vegetable mix. Mix to incorporate. Be careful not to burn yourself. Transfer to a plate and serve. Add any extra vegetables as desired for color and extra fiber (I added cherry tomatoes).

alternatives.name: Vegan BBQ Tofu Stir Fry Recipe
ingredients: 1 tablespoon Tamari (gluten-free soy sauce), low sodium preferred
3 each Garlic, fresh, grated or 2 teaspoon garlic powder
1 teaspoon Ginger, fresh, grated, or 3 teaspoons ginger powder
alternatives.recipe:
Prepare the BBQ sauce by combining all ingredients in a bowl. Whisk to incorporate. Keep on the side.
Drain tofu and press by placing paper towels in the top and bottom of the tofu and placing a hefty book carefully on top of the tofu. Use a small sheet tray if needed to capture the water drainage. Press for at least 5 minutes, discard paper towels, and then dice block evenly. Transfer to a bowl. Season tofu with cornstarch, 2 tablespoons of the BBQ sauce, and a pinch of salt. Mix with hands to coat tofu evenly. Set aside.
Heat up avocado oil on a non-stick pan over medium-high heat. Once the oil is slightly smoking (about 30-45 seconds of constant heat), add the tofu. You want to hear a sear go on as we are looking at caramelizing the tofu and browning it on most sides. Do this for about 2-3 minutes, stirring as necessary. Add the vegetables, along with the quinoa and brown rice. Saute for another 2-3 minutes until heated through. Lastly, add the sauce into the pan and mix to coat all ingredients evenly. The s...
Conversely, if you are tracking your macros closely, heat up the quinoa separately in a bowl in the microwave, covered with a damp paper towel for 2 minutes. Do the same with the Trifecta vegetables. Still reheat the tofu in the pan by searing it over medium-high heat with avocado oil and the sauce.
Portion ⅔ cup of quinoa, ½ cup of Trifecta veggies, and 4 ounce of the saucy tofu on a bowl. Garnish with fresh herbs like cilantro, and some sesame seeds.
Enjoy!

For sauce: In a small saucepan, heat 2 teaspoons of avocado oil over medium heat. Add the minced garlic and ginger, and stir often for about 1 minute or until a dark golden color begins to form. Add red pepper flakes, Chinese five-spice, and stir for another 30 seconds, until spices are bright. Immediately add the tamari, stir and bring to an aggressive simmer for 3-5 minutes. As the sauce simmers, mix cornstarch and water in a small bowl to make a slurry. Add slurry into the sauce and simmer...
Heat remaining 1 teaspoon of avocado oil in a large non-stick saute pan over medium-high heat. Add 1 teaspoon of garlic, stir to avoid garlic from burning, and immediately add diced seitan. Mix often. The goal with this step is to sear and develop a golden brown color for the seitan. Once the seitan has caramelized, add the sauce to the pan and stir. Add the Trifecta bell peppers. Coat seitan and veggies evenly and cook for 2 minutes. Remove from heat and keep warm until needed.
Warm up the rice in the microwave for about 2-2:30 minutes, along with the Trifecta broccoli.
Portioning in 4 bowls, plate in each ½ cup of Trifecta rice, ¼ cup of broccoli, and 4.5 ounces of tempeh mix. Garnish with ¼ avocado per bowl, sesame seeds and fresh cilantro.

ingredients: 2 cups diced tomato, canned, juice drained and ¼ cup reserved.
alternatives.recipe:
Microwave the Trifecta beef patties covered completely by a damp paper cloth towel, for a minute and a half. Remove from microwave and after the patties are slightly cooled down, crumble the patties to its original form - ground beef - with your hands into a separate bowl. Keep warm.
Combine all the seasoning spice mix ingredients in a separate bowl, with the exception of salt.
Dice the onion and keep in a bowl. Heat oil over medium-high in a pot large enough to hold all ingredients. Once the oil is shimmering and slightly smoking, add the onions, mix constantly to prevent onions from burning. Reduce heat to medium and cook onions for 3-5 minutes or until they start to develop a caramelized color. Use your best judgment on the timing. Once some caramelization begins to happen, add bell peppers and garlic and mix to cook for 2 minutes, avoiding the garlic from burnin...
Add the spice mix to the pot and mix to fully coat all the vegetables. The point of this step is to bring the fragrant tones of the spices up. After a few seconds, add canned tomatoes by crushing them with your hand as you add them to the pot, or by crushing them with a wooden or metal spoon in the pot. Mix and scrape any brown bits from the pan. Add ¼ cup of tomato juice, plus water or stock and increase the heat to bring to a boil. Once boiling, reduce heat to medium-high and maintain an ag...
Immediately add the ground beef along with honey, and mix to incorporate. Bring the pot back up to an aggressive simmer, mixing constantly, for about 3 minutes or until beef is heated through. Add extra water or stock if the sauce is becoming too thick.
Taste for seasoning and adjust as needed. Use your best judgment in the heat adjustment.
Portion around 5-6 ounces of chili into 4 bowls. There may be excess chili as the volume increases with the addition of all other ingredients (so you may have to weigh a bit more than 6 ounces).

Dice chicken into bite-size. Add chicken to pot with sauce and mix to incorporate. Simmer for 2-3 minutes or until chicken is warmed and evenly covered. Cover pot and keep warm until needed.
Reheat the rice and broccoli for 3 minutes in two separate microwave-safe bowls. Add an extra 30 seconds to a minute if extra time is needed.
In a bowl, plate the following: ⅓ cup of reheated Trifecta brown rice, followed by 4 ounces of the sesame honey ginger chicken, and ½ cup of the reheated Trifecta broccoli.
Garnish with sesame seeds, picked fresh cilantro, extra Sriracha, and/or chives & scallions. Enjoy!

alternatives.name: BBQ Chicken Sweet Potato Toast
alternatives.recipe:
First, Heat the sweet potatoes up in the microwave for about 5 minutes (each potato).
Using two forks try and shred the chicken up as much as possible. Also, dice the onions.
In a bowl, mix together the chicken, onions, and BBQ Sauce.
Once the potatoes have cooled. Cut into strips (hot dog style) to use as the base of the toast. Using a skillet, grill the sweet potatoes until golden brown. Add the mozzarella cheese to the top of the toast and let melt.
Add the chicken/onion mixture to the top of the toast.
Top with fresh cilantro. Enjoy!

alternatives.name: Steak Gyros with Easy Tzatziki Sauce Recipe
ingredients: 4 oz of Trifecta Flat Iron Steak
alternatives.recipe:
In a blender, add all of the ingredients for the sauce and blend until smooth.
In a skillet, heat up the Trifecta Flat Iron Steak and saute the onions. Once the desired level of cooked has been met, remove from heat.
Top pita bread with steak, onions, arugula, and tzatziki sauce.

alternatives.selected: Chicken Burrito Bowl Recipe

alternatives.name: Protein-Packed Smoky Bison Chili Recipe
ingredients: 1 lb ground bison (can sub ground beef or turkey)
1 can kidney beans, drained and rinsed
0.25 to 0.75 cup water or beef broth
alternatives.recipe:
Coat bottom of large pot with oil or nonstick spray
Saute chopped onion, garlic, and bacon for 2 minutes until onion becomes slightly translucent
Add in bison and cook 3-4 minutes
Add in fire roasted tomatoes, tomato sauce and all seasonings
Simmer 2-3 minutes
Stir in unflavored protein powder
Mix in kidney beans
Add water or broth until desired thickness
Add in liquid smoke
Allow to simmer 30 minutes
Serve topped with Greek yogurt, shredded cheddar and fresh chives

alternatives.name: Fall Pomegranate Chicken Salad Recipe
ingredients: 16 ounces Trifecta chicken breast, diced into squares evenly
4 tablespoons pomegranate seeds, store-bought to save time
¼ cup Trifecta almonds, favorite kind
4 tablespoon Mustard Honey Vin, store-bought or home-made
alternatives.recipe:
Prepare all ingredients as indicated. In a big bowl, mix all greens together. Season with a sprinkle of kosher salt.
Portion 0.5 cup of green mix in each plate, ⅓ cup of quinoa, 4 ounces of diced chicken, sprinkle 1 tablespoon of pom seeds, followed by 1 tablespoon of almonds, and 1 tablespoon of crumbled feta cheese in the middle of the salad.
Dress the salad with 1 tablespoon of mustard honey vin. Taste for seasoning and add another sprinkle of salt to the salad to bring up the flavor of all the ingredients. Enjoy!
Conversely, feel free to mix each salad in a bowl following the same serving sizes.

alternatives.name: Low-Fat, High-Protein Vegetarian BBQ Cobb Salad Recipe
ingredients: 0.5 cup low-sodium black beans, drained and rinsed
alternatives.recipe:
Cook TVP according to package directions
Mix TVP with BBQ sauce
Add lettuce and veggies to salad bowl
Top with TVP and BBQ mixture
Top with salad dressing of choice or additional BBQ sauce

alternatives.name: Keto Cauliflower Fried Rice
ingredients: 2 Stalks, green onion, sliced into rounds, green and white separated
alternatives.recipe:
Prepare the Cauliflower rice by cutting the cauliflower into florets and processing in a food processor until a grainy texture is achieved. Pulse for best results. Be careful not to process for too long, or the cauliflower will turn into mush.
Chop trifecta chicken breast into bite-size squares, maintaining an even cut to ensure even heating. Set aside. Rough chop trifecta eggs to add to the rice later on.
In sauté pan, over medium-high heat, heat 1 tbsp. of sesame oil and add garlic cloves and the white bulb of green onions. Lightly season with salt. Sauté until the onion and garlic begin to gain color. Immediately add the cauliflower rice.
Deglaze pan with tamari, and immediately add diced chicken and chopped eggs. Sauté until heated through.
Divide into two plates. Top with black sesame seeds, sliced bulb of green onions, and 1/4 avocado for each plate.

alternatives.name: Grilled Skirt Steak And Poblano Fajitas Recipe
alternatives.recipe:
Core and mash avocados, add 0.75 tsp salt, 0.25 tsp pepper, cilantro and 2 tbsp lime juice to make guacamole
Brush onion and peppers with 2 tsp olive oil
Coat steak with remaining 1 tsp olive oil and spice rub (ancho chile, cumin, salt, pepper)
Grill poblano peppers and onion 8-10 minutes, turning often
Grill steak 2-3 minutes per side for medium rare
Let steak rest under foil while slicing onion and peeling and slicing peppers
Toss onion and pepper with 1 tbsp lime juice and 0.25 tsp salt
Slice steak and serve with veggies, guacamole, hot sauce and corn tortillas

alternatives.name: Sriracha Honey Sesame Chicken Recipe
ingredients: ¾ cup water + 1 tablespoon garlic powder
¼ cup soy sauce, or tamari, low sodium
2 teaspoon cornstarch + 2 tablespoon water, mixed in a bowl
alternatives.recipe:
Place together all sauce ingredients in a medium pot and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to simmer and stir constantly for 2-5 minutes, allowing the sauce to slightly reduce. Add cornstarch 1 teaspoon at a time, allowing the cornstarch to react with the heat. Add a total of 3 teaspoons first and then adjust as desired. The sauce will thicken up over time. Cover and keep warm.
Dice chicken into bite-size. Add chicken to pot with sauce and mix to incorporate. Simmer for 2-3 minutes or until chicken is warmed and evenly covered. Cover pot and keep warm until needed.
Reheat the rice and broccoli for 3 minutes in two separate microwave-safe bowls. Add an extra 30 seconds to a minute if extra time is needed.
In a bowl, plate the following: ⅓ cup of reheated Trifecta brown rice, followed by 4 ounces of the sesame honey ginger chicken, and ½ cup of the reheated Trifecta broccoli.
Garnish with sesame seeds, picked fresh cilantro, extra Sriracha, and/or chives & scallions. Enjoy!

alternatives.name: Trifecta Five Minute Burger Recipe
ingredients: 4 hamburger buns, whole wheat or whole grain, toasted
2 tablespoons chipotle mayo or favorite condiment
½ cup arugula or any other bitter leafy green
½ cup Trifecta portobello mushroom, warmed
1 cup favorite Trifecta veggies, as a side
alternatives.recipe:
Begin by toasting buns in a toaster or toaster oven until golden brown.
Microwave Trifecta patties for 2 minutes to reheat, by making a small hole in a corner to allow steam to escape. Carefully remove plastic film and keep warm until needed. Spread the chipotle mayo on both burger buns. On the bottom bun, add a small ⅛ packed cup of arugula.
Slice tomatoes. Slice the avocados lengthwise and separate them into quarters. Fan avocado and place on top of the leafy greens. Carefully transfer the patties from the microwave to the bottom burger bun. Place 3 thin tomato slices or 2 thick slices on top of each patty. Top with ⅛ cup warm mushrooms and place the top bun on the burger.
Optional side: Reheat 1 cup of your favorite Trifecta vegetable and enjoy your 5-minute dinner!

alternatives.name: Beef Chop Suey Recipe
alternatives.recipe:
In a large nonstick frying pan add olive oil and beef, cook until brown. Do not overcook or beef goes tough
In a second pan, add olive oil, cabbage, celery, mushrooms, water chestnuts, soybean, vinegar and onion
Cook until entire mixture is hot and onions have softened
Add soy sauce, beef stock and cooked beef
Cook this mixture for 5-10 minutes

alternatives.name: Coconut Cashew Keto Fried Chicken Recipe
alternatives.recipe:
Add the cashews into a food processor and pulse until coarse dust is formed. Add the coconut flakes, garlic, salt, paprika, and parsley. Pulse once again to combine. Transfer to a medium bowl.
In a separate bowl mix the egg, coconut milk, and water mixture. Mix together by whipping with a fork or with a hand blender until fully incorporated. Add a pinch of salt and black pepper.
Coat chicken by soaking first in the egg-coconut milk mixture. Dip chicken in the egg mixture followed then by cashew mixture, fully coating both sides of each piece and shaking off any excess. Transfer to a holding plate until all chicken pieces are fully coated.
Heat a skillet over medium-high heat, and add the coconut and avocado oil and allow to heat for 1-2 minutes. Carefully add the breaded chicken to the skillet using tongs by placing the chicken away from you to avoid hot oil from splashing and burning you. Cook until browned on each side and warmed through (about 3-4 minutes per side).

alternatives.name: Joe Ohrablo's Protein Oatmeal Pancakes Recipe
ingredients: 20 grams of carbs from fruit (banana, blueberries or strawberries)
alternatives.recipe:
Mix all ingredients into a pancake batter, adding a tiny bit of water to make it easy to mix
Spray nonstick pan with cooking spray
Cook until brown on each side
Throw on cinnamon for extra taste
Top with sugar free syrup if desired

alternatives.name: Easy Bake Chorizo & Veggie Quiche Recipe
alternatives.recipe:
Preheat oven to 375 degrees
Coat 6 large muffin cups with nonstick spray
Heat a skillet over medium heat
Cook chorizo, onion and shredded potato
Whisk together eggs, egg whites, cottage cheese, salt and pepper
Add meat, onion, potato and broccoli to eggs
Evenly divide among 6 cups
Bake for 40-45 minutes
Allow to cool then gently remove from mold

alternatives.name: Creamy Vegan Pasta Alfredo Recipe
ingredients: 1 box chickpea or lentil pasta farfalle (or pasta of choice)
2 cups almond milk, soy milk, or hemp milk
½ cup roasted jarred piquillo peppers, drained
Pinch of salt and black pepper to taste
alternatives.recipe:
Prepare pasta according to package instructions.
Combine cashews and alternative milk n a microwave-safe container. Microwave on high for 3 minutes, stop to stir, then microwave for an additional 2 minutes.
Blend warmed cashews and liquid with other ingredients, 2-3 minutes. Season with a pinch of salt and pepper.
Toss with pasta and any added vegetables, top with vegan parmesan, and toasted cashews.

alternatives.name: Crispy Thai Steak Salad Recipe
ingredients: 1 Thai chili pepper, minced or serrano pepper
2 cups Zucchini Noodles or Shaved Zucchini
1/4 cup cashews or almonds, roasted and chopped
alternatives.recipe:
Mix all ingredients for the marinade together in a small bowl then toss with cubbed steak and set aside for 4-5 minutes.
To prepare Thai Peanut dressing, mix all ingredients together in a medium bowl, and adjust with water if too thick.
Toss zucchini, slaw mix, and salad dressing together.
To cook steak, heat a skillet over medium-high heat, add oil and saute for 2-3 minutes until lightly browned and heated through. Remove from pan and plate with salad.
Top salad with toasted cashews and additional fresh herbs.

alternatives.name: Paleo Coconut Yogurt Parfait Recipe
ingredients: 2 cups plain coconut yogurt (Plain So Delicious was used in this recipe)
Cinnamon powder and fresh mint leaves for garnish
alternatives.recipe:
If you haven’t already, prepare Trifecta’s paleo gluten-free granola recipe, or gather your paleo granola of choice.
Grab four separate small containers. Per container portion ¼ cup of coconut yogurt, ¼ cup of the paleo gluten-free granola, ¼ cup of mixed berries and sprinkle cinnamon powder on top of each container. Serve immediately or store in fridge. Enjoy!

alternatives.name: Chicken Burrito Bowl Recipe
ingredients: Fresh cilantro stems and or cheese of choice
alternatives.recipe:
Dice the chicken into even small squares, bite-size. Keep in a bowl. Chop the lettuce and keep separated. Make sure you clean your cutting board between tasks to avoid cross-contamination of flavors.
Mix the marinade ingredients in a bowl and whisk to incorporate. A paste should form. Toss the diced chicken into the bowl and coat uniformly.
Spray a non-stick pan with spray oil and heat over medium heat. Once the pan is beginning to slightly smoke, add the chicken and heat up 2-3 minutes, stirring constantly. Keep warm.
Meanwhile, reheat your rice in two separate bowls for 2.5 minutes in the microwave.
In a plate or bowl, plate ⅓ cup of white rice next to ⅓ cup of brown rice. Weight 4.5 ounces of chicken per bowl, ¼ cup of pico de gallo, ¼ cup of romaine, ¼ fanned avocado, and 2 teaspoons of greek yogurt on top. Pick washed fresh cilantro and garnish.

alternatives.name: Grilled Tilapia Tacos With Pico De Gallo Recipe
alternatives.recipe:
Chop tomatoes and toss in a bowl with minced jalapeno, cilantro and onion. Add juice of one lime and salt. This is your pico de gallo - refrigerate
Combine juice of one lime, salt, pepper and olive oil in a bowl and whisk. Marinade tilapia 15-20 minutes maximum
Mix reduced fat sour cream, cilantro and juice of another lime for cream sauce - refrigerate
Grill tilapia until cooked through
Allow tilapia to cool then slice
Place in tortilla, add sour cream mixture, top with pico de gallo
Add hot sauce if desired

alternatives.name: Swedish Beef Patties With Onions Recipe
alternatives.recipe:
Mash the potatoes and mix with the ground beef
Add salt, pepper and water, work the meat mixture until smooth and shape into patties
Heat a skillet with 1 tbsp butter, add the onions and cook over moderate heat until golden brown
Transfer onions to a platter and keep hot
Melt remaining butter in skillet and cook the patties over moderate heat until brown on both sides and cooked throughout

alternatives.name: Fast Chicken Shawarma with Sweet Potato Recipe
ingredients: Garnish, optional: Greek-lemon yogurt and chopped fresh parsley
½ teaspoon of the following: ground garlic, ground cumin, ground caraway, ground cardamom, ground ginger, paprika, ground cinnamon, and black pepper
alternatives.recipe:
Mix the Shawarma wet rub ingredients in a bowl. The consistency should be a paste
Dice the chicken into bite-size squares, as even as possible. Add diced chicken into the bowl with the spice paste. Mix to coat evenly.
Heat up a non-stick pan over medium heat, and spray to coat with spray oil. Add the chicken and heat for 2-3 minutes. Taste to make sure chicken is heated through. Turn off heat and keep warm until needed.
Warm-up both sweet potato mash and broccoli in separate bowls for 2.5 minutes in the microwave. Add 30 seconds if broccoli and sweet potato are not heated through. Keep warm until needed.
Plate ½ cup of sweet potato, along with ½ cup of broccoli and 4 ounces of the chicken Shawarma. Garnish with greek-lemon yogurt and parsley if desired.

alternatives.name: Fall Chicken and Rice Soup Recipe
ingredients: 8 cups water or stock, chicken and vegetable/mushroom base, split
To taste, Salt and Black Pepper
alternatives.recipe:
Prepare the chicken by dicing the chicken, or using the Trifecta pulled chicken, if preferred. Keep in a bowl until needed. Separately, prepare all vegetables as indicated. For the carrots, peel 2-3 depending on the size, cut the ends and discard, slice in half, and cut across evenly about 1” size half-moons. After washing, cut the celery across in an equivalent size to the carrots, discarding the tops and bottoms. Dice the onions on a medium size and mix with celery and carrots. This is call...
In a pan deep enough to hold all ingredients plus stock, heat up the grapeseed oil over medium-high heat, until the oil is shimmering and slightly smoking. Immediately add the mirepoix (onion, celery, carrot mix) and increase heat to high. Stir often avoiding the onions from burning, and adjust heat as needed, reducing if the vegetables begin to charr too much.
Cook mirepoix for 3-5 minutes, again - adjusting the heat as needed - or until the vegetables begin to become translucent. Add the diced chicken, along with the tomato paste. Mix to coat all ingredients in the pot with it. The tomato paste should cook and become fragrant for a few minutes. Before the paste begins to burn, add the stocks to the pan to deglaze and mix scraping any brown bits (this is flavor so make sure you do this with a wooden spoon ideally).
Bring the mix to a boil. Once boiling, add broccoli and rice. Simmer for another 3 minutes or until all vegetables are heated through. Serve immediately dividing all soup guts amongst 4 bowls, and then topping off with any extra stock.
If not eating immediately, cool the soup immediately by placing a large Ziploc bag filled with ice inside the pot, stirring occasionally. Once cooled down to 40F or below, store in an air-tight container.
